test-method.name: testLoginDeserializationToPojo
test-method.description: POST /login — deserialize response to LoginResponse POJO

test-method.name: testLoginMissingEmail
test-method.description: POST /login with missing email returns 400

test-method.name: testLoginMissingPassword
test-method.description: POST /login with missing password returns 400

test-method.name: testLoginTokenIsValidString
test-method.description: Extracted token is valid and non-empty string

test-method.name: testLoginWithInvalidCredentials
test-method.description: POST /login with invalid credentials returns 400 with error message

test-method.name: testLoginWithMapPayload
test-method.description: POST /login with Map payload returns 200 and token

test-method.name: testLoginWithValidCredentials
test-method.description: POST /login with valid credentials returns 200 and token

test-method.name: testLogout
test-method.description: POST /logout — verify response (ReqRes returns 200)

test-method.name: testRegisterDeserializationToPojo
test-method.description: POST /register — deserialize to LoginResponse POJO

test-method.name: testRegisterMissingPassword
test-method.description: POST /register with missing password returns 400

test-method.name: testRegisterWithUnknownEmail
test-method.description: POST /register with unknown email returns 400

test-method.name: testRegisterWithValidPayload
test-method.description: POST /register with valid payload returns 200 with token and id

test-method.name: testTokenUsedAsAuthHeader
test-method.description: Use extracted login token in subsequent request header

test-method.name: testAllUserIdsArePositive
test-method.description: Verify all users across page 1 have valid ids

test-method.name: testGetUserAvatarIsHttpsUrl
test-method.description: Verify avatar URL in response is a valid https URL

test-method.name: testGetUserByIdDeserializationToPojo
test-method.description: Deserialize single user GET response to POJO

test-method.name: testGetUserByIdReturns200
test-method.description: Verify GET /users/{id} returns correct user

test-method.name: testGetUserByInvalidIdReturns404
test-method.description: Verify GET /users/{id} with invalid id returns 404

test-method.name: testGetUserResponseTime
test-method.description: Validate response time under 5 seconds for GET user by id

test-method.name: testGetUsersDataFieldsNotNull
test-method.description: Verify user data fields — id, email, first_name, last_name, avatar

test-method.name: testGetUsersDataListNotEmpty
test-method.description: Verify user data list is not empty

test-method.name: testGetUsersDeserializationToPojo
test-method.description: Deserialize user list response to POJO and validate

test-method.name: testGetUsersEmailFormat
test-method.description: Verify email format in user list

test-method.name: testGetUsersPage2ReturnsDifferentData
test-method.description: Verify page 2 returns different data than page 1

test-method.name: testGetUsersPaginationFields
test-method.description: Verify pagination fields exist in response

test-method.name: testGetUsersPerPageParam
test-method.description: Verify GET /users with per_page param limits result size

test-method.name: testGetUsersReturns200
test-method.description: Verify GET /users returns 200 with valid body

test-method.name: testGetUsersSupportObject
test-method.description: Verify support object is present in list response

test-method.name: testCreateUserCreatedAtNotBlank
test-method.description: POST /users — verify createdAt is a non-blank timestamp

test-method.name: testCreateUserDeserializationToPojo
test-method.description: POST /users — deserialize create response to POJO

test-method.name: testCreateUserIdsAreUnique
test-method.description: POST /users — verify id is unique for each call

test-method.name: testCreateUserWithEmptyBody
test-method.description: POST /users with empty body — verify server accepts or rejects gracefully

test-method.name: testCreateUserWithMapBody
test-method.description: POST /users with Map body — verify 201

test-method.name: testCreateUserWithPojo
test-method.description: POST /users with POJO body — verify 201 and response fields

test-method.name: testCreateUserWithRawJson
test-method.description: POST /users with raw JSON string body — verify 201

test-method.name: testDeleteMultipleUsersReturn204
test-method.description: DELETE /users/{id} — multiple different ids return 204

test-method.name: testDeleteUserReturns204
test-method.description: DELETE /users/{id} — verify 204 No Content

test-method.name: testPatchUserJob
test-method.description: PATCH /users/{id} — partial update of job field

test-method.name: testPatchUserName
test-method.description: PATCH /users/{id} — partial update of name field

test-method.name: testPutResponseReflectsPayload
test-method.description: PUT /users/{id} — response body reflects sent values

test-method.name: testUpdateUserWithPut
test-method.description: PUT /users/{id} — verify 200 and updatedAt in response

test-method.name: testGetInvalidResourceReturns404
test-method.description: GET /api/unknown/{id} with invalid id returns 404

test-method.name: testGetResourceById
test-method.description: GET /api/unknown/{id} returns correct resource

test-method.name: testGetResourcesReturns200
test-method.description: GET /api/unknown returns 200 with resource list

test-method.name: testResourceColorFormat
test-method.description: GET /api/unknown — color fields start with #

test-method.name: testResourceFieldsExist
test-method.description: GET /api/unknown — each resource has id, name, year, color, pantone_value

test-method.name: testResourcesPaginationFields
test-method.description: GET /api/unknown — pagination fields present

test-method.name: testAllPostsHaveRequiredFields
test-method.description: GET /posts — every post has id, title, body, userId

test-method.name: testCollectUniqueUserIds
test-method.description: GET /posts — JsonPath collect unique userIds

test-method.name: testCommentsHaveEmailField
test-method.description: GET /posts/{id}/comments — every comment has email field

test-method.name: testCommentsViaQueryParamVsNestedPath
test-method.description: GET /comments?postId={id} returns same data as nested endpoint

test-method.name: testCreatePost
test-method.description: POST /posts with POJO returns 201 with echoed fields

test-method.name: testCreatePostDeserializeToPojo
test-method.description: POST /posts — deserialize response to PostResponse POJO

test-method.name: testCreatePostWithMap
test-method.description: POST /posts with Map body returns 201

test-method.name: testDeletePost
test-method.description: DELETE /posts/{id} — verify 200 empty body

test-method.name: testExtractAllTitlesWithGPath
test-method.description: GET /posts — extract all titles using GPath

test-method.name: testGPathFilterPostsByUserId
test-method.description: GET /posts — filter posts with userId < 3 via GPath

test-method.name: testGetAllPostsReturns100
test-method.description: GET /posts returns 200 and 100 posts

test-method.name: testGetCommentsForPost
test-method.description: GET /posts/{id}/comments returns non-empty list

test-method.name: testGetPostByIdParameterized
test-method.description: GET /posts/{id} — parameterized across multiple valid ids

test-method.name: testGetPostByIdParameterized
test-method.description: GET /posts/{id} — parameterized across multiple valid ids

test-method.description: GET /posts/{id} — parameterized across multiple valid ids

test-method.description: GET /posts/{id} — parameterized across multiple valid ids

test-method.name: testGetPostByInvalidIdReturns404
test-method.description: GET /posts/{id} with invalid id returns 404

test-method.name: testGetPostSoftAssertions
test-method.description: Validate GET /posts/1 with soft assertions

test-method.name: testGetPostsByUserId
test-method.description: GET /posts?userId=1 returns only posts for userId=1

test-method.name: testPatchPost
test-method.description: PATCH /posts/{id} — partial update of title only

test-method.name: testUpdatePostWithPut
test-method.description: PUT /posts/{id} — full update returns 200 with all echoed fields

test-method.name: testChainedThenAssertions
test-method.description: Chain multiple then() assertions in a single test

test-method.name: testCustomLoggingFilterCapturesOutput
test-method.description: Capture request/response log into string for assertion

test-method.name: testCustomRequestHeaders
test-method.description: Send request with custom correlation-id and user-agent headers

test-method.name: testErrorFieldAbsentInSuccessResponse
test-method.description: Assert optional 'error' field absent in successful response

test-method.name: testGPathMaxUserId
test-method.description: Use GPath to find max user id in the list

test-method.name: testMultipleExtractionMethods
test-method.description: Extract response values using .path(), .jsonPath(), .as()

test-method.name: testMultipleQueryParams
test-method.description: Send multiple query params in a single request

test-method.name: testRelaxedHttpsSpec
test-method.description: GET users using relaxed HTTPS spec — no cert validation
